name: claude-mem
description: Codex wrapper for the existing claude-mem runtime: persistent coding-session memory, context compression, and cross-session search.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory and compressed context for Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Uses the installed claude-mem worker to search prior coding-session observations, inject relevant context, and summarize session work for reuse.
defaultPrompt: Search prior memory for this codebase before starting.
Show recent observations related to the files I am editing.
Summarize what we learned and save it for future sessions.
